Map — bubbles per community, sized by permit count; click a bubble to drill in

Type of work

Seasonality — applications by month

Top contractors — by permit count

Permit processing speed — avg days applied→issued, by year

Cumulative buildout — cumulative permits & housing units over time

Days-to-issue distribution

Renovation lifecycle — years from new build to first renovation

filter to under 30,000 permits
(e.g. one community, or one year city-wide)

Auto-computed insights — recalculated for the current filter

Live dashboard · data: City of Calgary open data (c2es-76ed), queried on view · requires internet
